zh.lifeSummary: 當Lillian Doran於大約1095年出生在英國蘇格蘭Forfarshire蒙特洛斯時，她的父親William Doran26歲，母親Mary Jane Handy23歲。她和Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith至少有5個兒子。她去世於1153年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lillian Doran于大约1095年出生在英国苏格兰Forfarshire蒙特洛斯时，她的父亲William Doran26岁，母亲Mary Jane Handy23岁。她和Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith至少有5个儿子。她去世于1153年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安達爾凱斯享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Doran
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish James Patrick, Kieran, Pegeen, Brendan, Caitlin, Dymphna, Dympna, Lorcan, Roisin, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Deoradháin ‘descendant of Deoradhán’, a byname representing a diminutive of deoradh ‘pilgrim, stranger, exile’.

variants.name: Dorian
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Cecile, Celestine, Etienne, Jacques.  Armenian Ara, Anahid, Ashot, Garo, Houry, Saro.
Irish (Donegal and Down): variant of   Doran  .
Romanian: from a short form of the personal name Teodorian, derived from Teodor, Greek Theodōros (see Theodore ).

variants.name: Dorrian
meanings: Irish: County Down and Donegal variant of   Doran  .

variants.name: Dorrance
meanings: Scottish (Ayrshire and Kircudbrightshire): variant of Irish Doran , with excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Lillian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Lilian  , now the more frequent form.

variants.name: Lilian
meanings: Of uncertain origin, first recorded in the late 16th century, and probably derived from a nursery form of   Elizabeth .  It is now sometimes regarded as a derivative of the flower name   Lily  , but this was not used as a given name in England until the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Lillian Doran was born about 1095, in Montrose, Forfarshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Doran, was 26 and her mother, Mary Jane Handy, was 23. She had at least 5 sons with Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith. She died in 1153, in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lillian Doran est née environ 1095, à Montrose, Forfarshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Doran, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mary Jane Handy, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils avec Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith. Elle est décédée en 1153, à Dalkeith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lillian Doran um 1095 in Montrose, Forfarshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Doran 26 und ihre Mutter Mary Jane Handy 23. Sie hatte mit Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb 1153 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Dalkeith, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lillian Doran è nata il circa 1095 nel Montrose, Forfarshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Doran, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Mary Jane Handy, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli con Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith. Morì nel 1153, nel Dalkeith, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lillian Doranが約1095年にイギリススコットランドForfarshireモントローゼで生まれた時，父William Doranは26歳，母Mary Jane Handyは23歳であった。彼女はSir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeithとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1153年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンダルケイスで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lillian Doran(이)가 대략 1095년 영국 스코틀랜드 Forfarshire 몽로즈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Doran(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Jane Handy(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1153년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 다케이스에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lillian Doran nasceu aproximadamente 1095, em Montrose, Forfarshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Doran, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mary Jane Handy, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith. Ela faleceu em 1153, em Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lillian Doran родилась около 1095 г. в местности монтрос, Forfarshire, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Doran было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Jane Handy, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith. Она умерла в 1153 г. в местности далкит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lillian Doran nació aproximadamente 1095, en Montrose, Forfarshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, William Doran, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Mary Jane Handy, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Sir William de Graham Lord of Abercorn and Dalkeith. Murió en 1153, en Dalkeith, Midlothian, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
